description: Define the Agent interface in internal/agent/agent.go. This is the abstraction that allows different coding agents to be plugged in. Define ExecutionRequest and ExecutionResult structs. This is interface-only -- no implementation. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 5a for the exact interface and struct definitions.
commit: feat(agent): add Agent interface and execution types
steps: Create internal/agent/agent.go with the Agent interface: Execute(ctx context.Context, req ExecutionRequest) (*ExecutionResult, error)
Define ExecutionRequest struct: WorktreePath, TaskID, Description, Steps []string, ResumeFrom int
Define ExecutionResult struct: Success bool, StepsCompleted int, Output string, ImplementationNotes string, Error string
acceptance_criteria: Agent interface has a single Execute method matching the design doc
ExecutionRequest has all fields including ResumeFrom for retry support
ExecutionResult captures success/failure, output, and implementation notes
